case_title: RANULFO IRIAS GALEANO VS. HADJIHABIB RASHEED

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GALEANO, RANULFO IRIAS AS TO DEFENDANT RASHEED, HADJIHABIB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-10-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-10-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM C. LYNN. PLAINTIFF RANULFO IRIAS GALEANO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HADJIHABIB RASHEED IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS BESTY AYALA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM C. LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF GALEANO, RANULFO IRIAS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED MAR-21-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RASHEED, HADJIHABIB
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALEANO, RANULFO IRIAS
ORDER TO CONTINUE TO CURE FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2022 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUN-10-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A JUDICIAL OFFICER TO HEAR TODAY'S MATTER. PLAINTIFF RANULFO IRIAS GALEANO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HADJIHABIB RASHEED IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALEANO, RANULFO IRIAS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RASHEED, HADJIHABIB PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2022 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF SERVICE TO MAY-18-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF RANULFO IRIAS GALEANO IS PRESENT (ARRIVED LATE). DEFENDANT RASHEED HADJIHABIB IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILL NOT WAIVE UNTIMELY FILING. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO ALLOW CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY GALEANO, RANULFO IRIAS RASHEED, HADJIHABIB
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-10-2022 - JUDGMENT.
